summary:
The agent identifies that Option A incorrectly states only secondary education is considered in gross enrolment, when actual practice includes both primary and secondary education. The conclusion hinges on accurate understanding of HDI criteria rather than retrievable sources, with Option A being factually wrong based on established development metrics.  

(Note: Only two sentences.)
